scripts.worker:dev: npm run db:build && npm run dev -w @squash-assistant/worker
scripts.worker:build: npm run db:build && npm run build -w @squash-assistant/worker
scripts.ui:dev: npm run db:build && npm run dev -w @squash-assistant/ui
scripts.ui:build: npm run db:build && npm run build -w @squash-assistant/ui
